figures.caption: Figure 2: Feat2Go trains an embodied value model from visual-language inputs to predict a discretized progress value, which is used to reshape sparse terminal rewards. The resulting dense terminal reward is then integrated into PPO or GRPO to provide progress-aware policy optimization.

Table 1: Results on ManiSkill3 under in-distribution and out-of-distribution evaluation. Results are measured by success rate (%). The upper part reports SFT results, while the lower part reports RL methods. Avg denotes the average performance across all OOD settings.
Table 2: Evaluation on six RoboTwin 2.0 tasks. Results are measured by success rate (%). Avg represents the average success rate across all six tasks.

Figure 1: Overview of Feat2Go value estimation and main results. Feat2Go derives dense progress values from V-JEPA 2 features via trend-based semantic clustering and hierarchical value assignment, leading to strong VLA performance gains on ManiSkill3 and RoboTwin 2.0.
